title: Homepage hero section
content: Interactive Online Courses: Connect, Learn, Grow. Experience self paced and cohort based learning to build lasting connections. The homepage includes All Courses and Explore more buttons.

title: Homepage intro video
content: The homepage hero contains an embedded YouTube video. Video URL: https://youtube.com/embed/yyhL6Zbu-dY?showinfo=0&rel=0

title: Why NUST ConnectEd
content: Flexible Learning Experience: flexibility with pre-recorded courses and structured cohort-based learning. Expert-Led Courses: taught by industry experts and seasoned educators. Interactive Cohort Model: fosters collaboration, discussion, and networking opportunities. Comprehensive Learning Resources: supplementary materials, resources, and assessments.

title: Homepage FAQ section
content: Frequently Asked Questions on the homepage include: When should I apply? What is hybrid-based learning about? What is Self Paced Learning about? How to enroll in the course at ConnectEd? Where do I access my student account? How do I decide which courses to take? Where do I ask technology questions?

title: Homepage enrollment callout
content: The homepage highlights that enrollments for Math Condensed Course are open and includes an Enroll Now button linked to the enrollment page for course id 186.

title: Homepage support contact
content: The footer shows Contact Us: info@connected.nust.edu.pk.

title: Homepage important links
content: Important links shown in the footer include FAQ's, About Us, and Contact Us. Policy links include Terms and Conditions, Privacy Policy, Refund and Exchange Policy, and Delivery Policy.

title: Homepage social links
content: The footer includes Linkedin, Facebook, and Instagram links for ConnectEd.
